guide.title: Choose your guide
guide.subtitle: Select who will accompany you on this journey.

data.title: Personal data
data.subtitle: Share some information to enrich your feedback.
data.name: Full name

selfie.title: Take your photo
selfie.instruction: Move the phone slightly away and position your face. Your guide will lead you.

questions.what_brought_you_here: What brought you to this journey?
questions.greatest_spiritual_dream: What is your greatest spiritual dream?
questions.current_challenges: What are your biggest current challenges?
questions.fear_or_doubt: How do you deal with fear or doubt?
questions.meaning_of_light: What does light mean to you?
questions.what_to_change: What do you want to change in your life?
questions.practice_gratitude: How do you practice gratitude daily?
questions.journey_lesson: What lesson do you take from this journey?
questions.future_application: How will you apply this in your future?
questions.message_to_future_self: A message for your future self.
questions.essence_today: Who are you today, in one true sentence?
questions.next_step: What will be your next step of faith and courage?

final.title: Thank you for walking this path with the Light
final.message1: Your answers were received with honor by the Brotherhood.
final.message2: You planted seeds of trust, courage, and light.
final.message3: Keep walking. The journey does not end here.
final.message4: Return whenever you need to rekindle your flame.
final.message5: You are light. You are transformation.
